visible_entities.desc: Logo graphic featuring a stylized illustration of a woman with long red hair, wearing a grey sleeveless top and a red skirt. The text 'Hot Thai Kitchen' is in a bold, black, rounded font. The entire graphic is enclosed in a rough, hand-drawn style black rectangular border on a white background.

atomic_facts.fact: A static logo graphic is displayed.
The illustration shows a woman with red hair and a red skirt.

spatial: The text 'Hot Thai Kitchen' is to the left of the woman illustration. The woman figure is positioned on the right side of the logo, inside the black border.

visible_entities.desc: person's hand with fair skin and silver metal wristwatch
large silver metal wok with a shiny surface
chopped yellow-orange squash cubes with green skin edges
metal spatula with a silver surface
minced garlic or ginger in oil

atomic_facts.fact: A person pours chopped yellow squash from a pink bowl into a wok.
The wok contains minced garlic or ginger cooking in oil.
A metal spatula is resting inside the wok.

spatial: The person's hand is positioned on the right side of the frame, holding the pink bowl over the center of the large silver wok. The yellow squash cubes are falling from the bowl into the wok, landing on top of the minced garlic and oil at the bottom. The metal spatula rests inside the wok to the left of the falling squash.
state_changes: Cooking action starts with ingredients poured into wok

visible_entities.desc: person with fair skin, wearing a dark green short-sleeved top and a beaded necklace with silver accents, and a silver watch on the left wrist
white square bowl containing a stir-fry dish with orange cubes, dark green leafy vegetables, and scrambled egg pieces
light-colored wooden cutting board with visible grain
large metal wok with oil residue and a slotted spoon inside

atomic_facts.fact: person arranges fresh basil leaves on top of the stir-fry in the white bowl
the stir-fry contains orange cubes (likely squash or sweet potato), dark greens, and scrambled egg
the white bowl sits on a wooden cutting board
a wok with cooking residue is visible in the background

spatial: The person is to the left and above the white bowl. The white bowl is centered on the wooden cutting board. The wok is behind and to the right of the bowl. The basil leaves are being placed on top of the food inside the bowl.
state_changes: Plating and garnishing phase begins with basil addition
